title: 最近在quora（这个网站也被皇军渗透得不行）上看到一个有关中国人不信神的问题
meta_description: 最近在quora（这个网站也被皇军渗透得不行）上看到一个有关中国人不信神的问题 - 我看了一个回答，被其糟糕的英文，低级的逻辑谬误以及与现实世界不符的言论逗乐了: P.S.: Once on Chinese “Q&A” website Zhihu.com, someone seeked help. Trying to respon...
meta_keywords: 近在,quora,网站,皇军,渗透,不行,看到,一个,中国人,不信神,问题
contents:
我看了一个回答，被其糟糕的英文，低级的逻辑谬误以及与现实世界不符的言论逗乐了:
P.S.: Once on Chinese “Q&A” website Zhihu.com, someone seeked help. Trying to respond his reverse-nationalism teacher’s accusation “Unlike we Chinese defile everything, those nation who have belief have something sacred inviolable. ”

and this poem won most upvote among all answers.

“你的老师说每个民族都应该有不可亵渎的东西；
天破了，自己炼石来补；
洪水来了，不问先知，自己挖河渠疏通；
疾病流行，不求神迹，自己试药自己治；
在东海淹死了就把东海 填平，被太阳暴晒的就把太阳射下来；
谁愿意做拣选的石子就让他去吧，谁愿意做俯伏的羔羊也让他去吧；
谁愿意跪天子跪权臣就让他去吧，谁想不问苍生问鬼神也让他去吧；
斧头劈开的天地之间，到处都是不愿做奴隶的人。
这就是这个民族不可亵渎的东西。”

“Your teacher says, all nation should have something inviolable.

Sky is broken, we refine stones to fill;

Flood rampaging, not we asked from prophet, but dredge all rivers to make it flow;

Plague spreading, not we begged divine grace, but taste all herbs to figure a cure;

Drowned in sea, then fill up the ocean;

Burnt by sun, then shot them down from sky;

those who want to be stones ready for pick, let it be;

those who want to be sheeps bow with piety, let it be;

those who knee in front of powerful, let it be;

those who ask help from divinity instead of humanity, let it be;

Between the sky and ground diveded by axe,

People refuse to be enslaved stand everywhere.

This is something inviolable for this nation.”
